description: Implement customer features in Flutter: onboarding/login, product browsing, cart, checkout, orders/tracking, account (wallet, loyalty, favorites, addresses, notifications, settings), and support. Include widget/unit tests.
steps: Create additional mobile API endpoints needed by Flutter that are not suitable as cookie-based: (a) app/api/mobile/v1/products/route.ts - GET with query params for category, search, featured, pagination. Returns products with id, name, slug, price, discountPrice, image, unit, stock, category, gstRate. (b) app/api/mobile/v1/categories/route.ts - GET returns all active categories with id, name, slug, image, sortOrder. (c) app/api/mobile/v1/cart/validate/route.ts - POST accepting cart items [{productId, quantity}], returns validated items with current prices, stock availability, and any unavailable items flagged. (d) app/api/mobile/v1/orders/route.ts - POST for placing orders (same logic as existing /api/orders but using mobile auth), GET for order history. (e) app/api/mobile/v1/orders/[id]/route.ts - GET for order detail with status events and delivery partner location. (f) app/api/mobile/v1/account/route.ts - GET for profile, PATCH for updates. (g) app/api/mobile/v1/banners/route.ts - GET active banners. (h) app/api/mobile/v1/support/route.ts - GET tickets, POST new ticket. app/api/mobile/v1/support/[id]/messages/route.ts - GET messages, POST new message. All these use authenticateMobileRequest for auth.

Implement Flutter auth feature: lib/features/auth/presentation/login_screen.dart (phone input with Indian formatting), lib/features/auth/presentation/otp_screen.dart (6-digit OTP input with auto-submit, countdown timer, resend logic). Use OTP sending endpoint /api/auth/otp/send (existing). Connect to auth repository.

Implement Flutter product browsing: lib/features/products/data/product_repository.dart, lib/features/products/domain/product_model.dart (Freezed), lib/features/products/presentation/home_screen.dart (banners carousel, category grid, featured products), lib/features/products/presentation/category_screen.dart (product grid with search), lib/features/products/presentation/product_detail_screen.dart (image, price, add to cart).

Implement Flutter cart: lib/features/cart/data/cart_repository.dart (local persistence with SharedPreferences or similar), lib/features/cart/domain/cart_item_model.dart, lib/features/cart/presentation/cart_screen.dart (item list, quantity controls, subtotal, proceed to checkout). Cart must reconcile with server prices before checkout (call /api/mobile/v1/cart/validate).

Implement Flutter checkout: lib/features/checkout/presentation/checkout_screen.dart with address selection (saved addresses from /api/mobile/v1/account with addresses), GPS location detection, payment method selection (COD, UPI_ON_DELIVERY, CARD, WALLET), delivery mode (ASAP/scheduled with slot picker), promo code, loyalty points redemption. Use server-confirmed totals. Submit via /api/mobile/v1/orders POST.

Implement Flutter orders: lib/features/orders/data/order_repository.dart, lib/features/orders/domain/order_model.dart, lib/features/orders/presentation/orders_screen.dart (list of orders with status badges), lib/features/orders/presentation/order_detail_screen.dart (items, status timeline, delivery partner location on map if status is OUT_FOR_DELIVERY/ARRIVING). Poll /api/mobile/v1/orders/[id] for live updates or use periodic refresh.

Implement Flutter account: lib/features/account/presentation/account_screen.dart (profile info, menu items), wallet_screen.dart (balance + transaction history), loyalty_screen.dart (points balance + history), favorites_screen.dart (product list with remove), addresses_screen.dart (list + add/edit/delete), notifications_screen.dart (notification list with mark-as-read), settings_screen.dart (push notification toggles).

Implement Flutter support: lib/features/support/presentation/support_screen.dart (ticket list), ticket_detail_screen.dart (messages with reply), new_ticket_screen.dart (subject, order selection, message).

Add unit tests: test/features/auth/auth_repository_test.dart (mock Dio, test login flow, token refresh, logout). test/features/cart/cart_repository_test.dart (add, remove, quantity update, persistence). test/features/checkout/checkout_validation_test.dart (distance check, minimum order, payment method rules).

Add widget tests: test/features/auth/login_screen_test.dart (renders phone input, validates format). test/features/cart/cart_screen_test.dart (shows items, updates quantity). test/features/products/home_screen_test.dart (renders categories and products).
Run 'cd mobile && flutter analyze && flutter test' to verify.
Commit with message 'feat: implement Flutter customer features with tests'.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile API v1 endpoints for products, categories, cart validation, orders, account, banners, and support exist and use mobile auth
Flutter app has complete customer flow: login -> browse -> cart -> checkout -> orders -> account
Cart persists locally and validates against server before checkout
Checkout uses server-confirmed prices (never trusts client totals)
flutter analyze passes with no errors
flutter test passes all unit and widget tests
verification: Run 'cd mobile && flutter analyze' - no errors
Run 'cd mobile && flutter test' - all tests pass
Run 'npm run build' - backend builds successfully
findings: All backend API endpoints created successfully (products, categories, cart/validate, orders, orders/[id], account, banners, support, support/[id]/messages). Flutter Banner naming conflict with Flutter widget resolved using prefixed import. Cart uses abstract CartStorage interface for testability. All 55 Flutter tests pass. Backend builds (npm run build) successfully. Backend tests: 29 pass, 1 pre-existing failure (scroll-preservation.test.ts unrelated to this feature). flutter analyze: no issues. shared_preferences added to pubspec for cart persistence.
